emails.subject: RE: Users on Enron's CQG
emails.body: Daniel, I rebooted and CQG is not there. Will I have to reinstall? and How do I do that? Will it be back in the morning?

emails.subject: RE: Users on Enron's CQG
emails.body: I was unable to login to CQG under my user name Joe Parks) this morning.

emails.subject: RE: Users on Enron's CQG
emails.body: Give me a call if you are still having problems. x44344. Daniel

emails.subject: RE: Users on Enron's CQG
emails.body: I have called a few people and found that the estate team will be supporting you. I forwarded your phone number and let them know to get this done ASAP. You should get a call soon. Good luck, Daniel

emails.subject: RE: Users on Enron's CQG
emails.body: What about the others in my group?

emails.subject: RE: Users on Enron's CQG
emails.body: are the others having the same problem? I had asked you that and you told me that they were working.
